transcript.text:
[A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
Hello everyone
[Wait, who is this?]
Why's my voice like this?
[Comedian Kim Tae Kyun from Cultwo Show] Hello
I came to Ebiga Jjampong today
He is the representative model for this restaurant so he's here with me
Tzuyang is known for being a good eater
So I was wondering if you'd like to do a challenge mukbang
I like that You do?
Very competitive
This is today's timer
You see the time, right?
20 seconds Jk, 20 minutes
Finish 5 bowls from here
You don't need to finish the soup And you'll win 100 bowls from here

But if you fail, I need to pay for 100 bowls worth
Then I need to beat the challenge? Yes, please...
[Hungry]
I haven't eaten anything today
So I'm very hungry
[What is this?]
[Serving robot Ppong-e]
Ebiga Ppong-e is delivering to Tzuyang!
A delicious jjampong meal is being delivered
[Now everyone knows Tzuyang is here]
What is that
[A professional server to the end]
Your order is here
Thank you
It has a name too
Were you surprised?

I was going to serve you, but he insisted
This one is Ppong-e and the other one is Jjam-e
They serve the food here? Yes
[Let's set it up]
[Jjampong=Spicy Seafood Noodles]
Setting it all up for me
Thank you
Go now
Confirm
It's going now Bye
[It seems lonely]
The timer will start when you're ready
You got this
I don't want to pay
Let's mix up the noodles
It smells good

Really, it looks so good
It keeps going in the mouth, that's why it's called Ebiga (Eeb means mouth in Korean)
Is that so?
Goes in the mouth=Ebiga?
Do you think I'll be able to do it?
Of course
You're Tzuyang
Tell me when you're ready
Ready, Tzuyang Fighting!
[Challenge Mukbang Start]
Looks good
The noodles are long and thin
[Getting all the noodles first]
That's good
Did you finish 1 bowl already?
Where did he go?

[A box of plum juice]
I will need to fuel up for you So here's a box
Thank you
[Very whole-heartedly]
I will pour for you as you eat
Really?
I've never seen anyone else fuel up before
Thank you
You have to angle it up more
[There's a technique to this]
This much noodles
[Getting the noodles out before it gets bloated]
[Pile of noodles]
A mountain
[5 minutes have elapsed]
That's not bad?

The soup is savory
It's like a mix of beef broth plus seafood soup
It's not too strong, right?
That's tasty I can taste the beef broth
[There's still food left inside the bowls]
[7 minutes have elapsed]
She's drinking the juice I poured
She's taking her time to eat, but the food is going away fast
There was a pile just now
I'm watching this live
You have 12 minutes left
It's hot in here
Thank you
Don't worry about me
Thank you
Just call me the Gas Station

11 minutes left
I think this can be a very close call
But I believe in Tzuyang
Exactly 5 minutes left
[I should speed it up a little]
[Servicing with all his heart]
About 3 minutes and a half
[Honey, I didn't spend money]
[Don't get ahead of yourself]
She's not rushing at all
[She's rushing]
Doesn't look urgent
As if she has spare time
Unbelievable, she's eating this fast
[Getting ready to push the 'stop' button]
You're finished

Can I pause the time then? Is she done?
Yes
She has 2 minutes and 41 seconds left Amazing
I thought I was not going to be able to do it
So amazing
Really amazing
Tzuyang at Ebiga Jjampong
100 free jjampong bowls!
Thank you
Stay seated, please
All clear with 2 minutes and 41 seconds to spare
How about a round of applause?
100 free bowls as promised!
What if she eats all that in 1 week?
It's not that I can't eat all 100 bowls, but
I want to donate this to people in need

Then we can't just stand and watch Ebiga?
[Owner] Add another 100 bowls to this
[Additional 100 bowls to give out for donation]
Do you have any gift for this angel Tzuyang?
Eat at our restaurant for free for the rest of your life
Eat for free for the rest of your life at all Ebiga restaurants
She won't even do that do me and I'm their model
Can you eat more? Of course
There are a lot of different dishes here
Then I will use 2 coupons to eat more
No, it's for free
[Mild Jjampong]
[Ebiga Fried Pork with Sweet & Sour sauce]
[Sweet & Sour Spicy Chicken with Shrimp]
It's coming
It's here

It's Jjam-e this time
Hello and thank you
Now I will get fueled
Gotta tilt it at once
How was the jjampong though?
It was very different
It had a lot of beef broth flavor
Yes, it's different from other jjampongs
The noodles were also made with alkaline water, so it's good to eat after a night out
You're very informed about this
Of course, I'm the model here
I've been wanting to eat the soup with rice
She knows what's up
This is rice, right?
That's how you're supposed to eat
It's a tiny bowl of rice

It will look even smaller next to my face
This is a perfect size for someone to eat after the noodles
This comes with the meal? Yes, complimentary
Do you dip the sauce or pour the sauce?
I like dipping
What do you like?
I like both I just like to eat
[Can't resist]
Looks good
The soup goes so well with the rice
I think it's better with rice
Can we add more rice?
It's all you can eat
Unlimited rice
Not soup, right?
That's a little...

The soup here is really
It's not too strong, but flavorful
It's really delicious with rice
This is really good
This needs to be eaten first
It will get soggy
The meat used here is Hanwoo? (Korean Beef) No way
That's tasty
I don't know how to slurp the noodles
It cuts off That's why I eat it cut
That's not correct though
Just put it in your mouth and slurp
[Runs out of breath]
You want to learn a new talent?
Okhee (his girl character)
I like Okhee

There's a tone
Mister~
Mister~
That was good
Mister, would you like some eggs?
[Can't do it]
Just a sec
That's not it
Looks good
Crispy on the outside, tender on the inside
So delicious
It's very chewy
That's so chewy Amazing
Also, there are 4 flavors of jjampong here
I ate the regular one
This one is mild

So the soup is lighter
Let's give it a try
This is perfect for someone that's not good with spice
Her sound is amazing
That makes anyone hungry
The fried dumplings shouldn't be too different Let's try it
Chili dumplings
The fried foods here are so good
Thin layer, right?
This is like something you'd eat at a dumpling restaurant
It's filled with meat too
It's really like something from a dumpling house
I like that it's filled
And moist
King shrimp
[No sound effects need to be edited in]

That's so big
It's usually a smaller shrimp with thicker batter
This is just a big shrimp
Yummy
[He can't eat anymore]
Honestly, it was very delicious
The jjampong here is very different from other ones
It was very amazing with rice
I had a lot of fun today
It's a mukbang experience I won't forget
There's a theme song here too
It goes in the mouth, Ebiga Jjampong
Keeps going in the mouth Ebiga Jjampong!
[Part of the advertising revenue will be donated to 'Gangseo Youth Shelter']
Would you like to come out on Cultwo show sometime? (radio show)
Me? I'd love to. It'd be an honor

[Calling to see if she can come]
Hello this is Cultwo Show Producer Kim Seo Yeon
Hello this is Tzuyang
We asked our team and they would love for you to come
Thank you
Tzuyang will be on Cultwo Show 08.10.2021 SBS Power FM [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
